title: Peppery Roasted Spanish Radish Roast
description: A vibrant, lowcalorie Spanish-inspired dish featuring peppery roasted radishes that are rich in flavor yet easy on the waistline.
instructions: Wash and trim radishes, then slice each into ½‑inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, garlic powder, dried oregano, and salt. Toss radish slices until evenly coated.
Spread radish slices in a single layer on a parchment‑lined baking sheet, leaving space between each slice.
Roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, flipping halfway through until edges are crisp and radishes are tender.
Remove the sheet from the oven and let the radishes cool for a few minutes. Sprinkle lemon zest, chopped parsley, and cilantro over the top.
Serve warm as a side dish or light main course. Optional: drizzle with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice before serving.
